name: drug-pipeline-mcp
description: Pharmaceutical R&D Pipeline Intelligence — clinical trials, FDA/EMA approvals, safety data, drug labels, patents & publications
author: DasClown

search_trials.description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov for clinical trials by condition, phase, status, sponsor

get_trial_detail.description: Full protocol for a specific clinical trial by NCT ID

lookup_drug.description: Drug info: active ingredients, ATC classification, NDC, RxNorm

get_approvals.description: FDA approval history with submission dates and status

get_eu_approvals.description: EU/EMA authorization status — brand names, ATC, orphan/biosimilar flags

get_safety_data.description: FAERS adverse event reports — top reactions, serious outcomes

approved_for_condition.description: Find EU-approved drugs for a medical condition

get_trial_results.description: Trial outcome measures, adverse events, baseline, participant flow

list_orphan_drugs.description: EU orphan drug designations filterable by therapeutic area

company_pipeline.description: Company R&D pipeline — all trials grouped by phase + EU approval status

get_drug_label.description: FDA drug label — indications, boxed warnings, contraindications, dosing

get_recalls.description: FDA drug recalls — Class I/II/III, reasons, dates, firms

detect_safety_signals.description: PRR safety signal detection from FAERS data

get_patent_expiry.description: Patent & exclusivity info from FDA data

get_drug_interactions.description: Drug-drug interactions — FDA label interactions + FAERS co-reported drugs

drug_pipeline.description: Composite: drug info + FDA + EU + safety + label + signals + recalls + trials + publications + patent

pricing.description: $0.003 per tool call. Free tier: 10 calls/day for evaluation.
pricing.reason: Pharmaceutical R&D intelligence — clinical trial screening, safety signals, regulatory intelligence at enterprise scale
